title: Baby Moses Basket Mattress 72 x 26.5 x 4 cm – Firm Support for Newborns – Hypoallergenic, Lightweight, Breathable Quilted Removable Zip Cover – Fits Standard Moses Baskets – UK Made
features: Firm Support for Newborns: AMANSTYLE Moses basket mattress provides consistent, supportive comfort for infant sleep; resists sagging and keeps baby well-supported through naps and nights.
Breathable & Hypoallergenic Comfort: Hypoallergenic, lightweight quilted removable zip cover promotes airflow and feels gentle on sensitive skin for a fresher sleeping surface.
Removable & Washable Cover: Zip-off cover is easy to remove and washable, helping you keep the baby mattress hygienic and fresh with minimal effort.
Snug Fit for Standard Baskets: Sized to fit most wicker and palm standard Moses baskets; measure internal length & width to ensure a neat, secure fit with minimal gaps; lightweight and easy to move.

Certified & UK Made Quality: Crafted in the UK with hypoallergenic materials and tested to meet BS EN 16890 safety standards, this mattress is durable, safe, and parent-trusted. A high-quality baby Moses basket mattress that blends comfort, compliance, and long-lasting support.
